About

Turning complex processes into
elegant flows

I'm Jean — an AI Automation Specialist, Project Manager, and L&D expert based in Cebu City with 10+ years of experience in training, operations, and process optimization.

I specialize in building end-to-end AI-powered workflow automation using n8n, OpenAI, and Google Workspace — reducing manual operations by up to 70%.

With deep roots in learning & development and people leadership, I bring a rare combination: I understand how humans work — and how to make AI work alongside them seamlessly.

Outside of work you'll find me running or open water swimming — I'm the kind of person who signs up for hard things and shows up anyway.

Case Studies

Automation in action

Real flows I designed and shipped — from problem definition to deployed automation.

Flow 01
Intelligent PM Routing System

Automatically triages incoming project requests and routes them to the right project manager based on capacity, expertise, and priority — with duplicate prevention gates, unique Project ID generation, and automated Slack notifications serving 4 clusters and up to 16 PMs.

Flow 02
AI-Powered PS Doc Builder

Reads Screener, PST, and Email Thread documents, passes content to OpenAI for structured data extraction, then auto-populates and formats a complete professional services document — delivered via Slack with zero manual writing.

Flow 03
Scheduling Kick-Off Automation

Monitors the response sheet for new experts, reads project details via Google Docs, uses GPT-4o to generate a personalized outreach draft, then creates a Gmail draft and sends a Slack notification — all triggered automatically on row addition.

Services

What I can do for you

From automation builds to team leadership — here's where I show up and deliver.

⚙️
Workflow Automation

Tired of repetitive manual tasks eating your day? I build n8n workflows that handle them automatically so your team can focus on what matters.

🤖
AI Integration

Need AI to actually do useful work in your business? I build GPT-4o flows that generate, extract, and decide — saving hours every single day.

📋
Process Mapping

Something in your workflow feels broken but you can't pinpoint it? I find the bottleneck most people miss and redesign the flow around it.

📊
Project Management

Projects slipping through the cracks? I own the timeline, keep stakeholders updated, and make sure nothing gets dropped — so you don't have to.

💼
Virtual Assistant

Drowning in admin, emails, and scheduling? I take the day-to-day off your plate completely — and automate the parts that keep coming back.

🏆
Go High Level (GHL)

Got GHL but not using it properly? I set up your CRM, build your pipelines, and create automations that actually nurture and convert your leads.

👥
Team Management

Remote team not performing the way you need? I lead, coach, and implement QA systems that bring out the best in your people.

📚
Training & L&D

New hires taking too long to get up to speed? I build onboarding programs, SOPs, and training workflows that get your team ready fast.

Professional Summary

Results-driven Virtual Assistant, Project Manager, and AI Automation Specialist with 10+ years of experience spanning customer service, quality assurance, performance coaching, instructional design, and operations management. Currently building end-to-end AI-powered workflow automation systems using n8n, OpenAI, and Google Workspace — reducing manual operations by up to 70%. Proven expertise in team leadership, GROW coaching, Kirkpatrick evaluation, root cause analysis, and stakeholder management. Combines deep people skills with hands-on technical automation capabilities to help businesses work smarter, not harder.

Professional Experience
Project Manager February 2025 – April 2026
Zintro — Expert Recruitment Platform  |  Remote
  • Designed and built an end-to-end AI-powered operations automation system using n8n, reducing manual project routing and coordination time by an estimated 70%
  • Architected a multi-cluster, multi-PM routing workflow with duplicate prevention gates, unique Project ID generation, and automated Slack notifications — serving 4 clusters and up to 16 project managers
  • Built a PS Doc Builder automation that reads Screener, PST, and Email Thread documents, passes content to OpenAI for structured data extraction, and auto-populates project documentation — cutting document preparation time from 5–6 hours to 30 minutes
  • Managed end-to-end expert recruitment projects including client communication, progress updates, outreach review, response monitoring, and recruiter coordination across multiple simultaneous engagements
  • Performed CRM data entry and management, maintaining accurate project records and ensuring data integrity across all active projects
  • Identified and resolved recruitment blockers through root cause analysis, proactive client communication, and strategic recruiter deployment
Learning Analyst (Instructional Designer) July 2024 – February 2025
ePerformax Contact Centers  |  Cebu City, Philippines
  • Analyzed training effectiveness and performance data to identify skill gaps and recommend strategic learning solutions using the Kirkpatrick Four Levels model
  • Applied root cause analysis frameworks (Fishbone, 5 Whys) to optimize processes and reduce performance gaps by 20%
  • Led leadership training programs, enhancing team productivity by 15% through structured GROW coaching techniques
  • Conducted performance reviews, SWOT analysis, and one-on-one coaching sessions for team leaders, fostering accountability and measurable improvement
  • Developed and executed SMART action plans, improving leadership effectiveness and cross-functional communication
Leadership Development & Product Trainer February 2021 – July 2024
ePerformax Contact Centers  |  Cebu City, Philippines

  • Designed and maintained training materials; evaluated training effectiveness and provided coaching throughout onboarding and development programs
  • Facilitated virtual and in-person training sessions aligned with business goals and leadership competency frameworks
Performance Development Coach October 2020 – February 2021
ePerformax — Sprint (T-Mobile)  |  Cebu City, Philippines

  • Provided structured coaching and feedback, aligning individual team goals with corporate objectives — all 3 teams achieved top performance rankings during tenure
Quality Assurance Specialist October 2019 – September 2020
ePerformax — Sprint (T-Mobile)  |  Cebu City, Philippines
